profile.name: Abhijith Suresh Kumar
profile.tagline: Crafting digital experiences through storytelling and strategy.
profile.specialization: Content Strategy · UI/UX Writing · Brand Communications
profile.bio: Equal parts copywriter, UX writer, and content strategist. I build scalable content frameworks and drive engagement across media, tech, and product environments.

experience.summary: Optimized social media content for brand campaigns, ensuring messaging consistency and quality control.
highlights: Coordinated communications with Fleishman Hillard and partner agencies for global clients.
Researched PR and digital marketing trends; produced case studies to inform strategies.
Mentored junior writers and promoted best practices in copywriting.

experience.summary: Led content design for user interfaces and marketing campaigns across HerKey's digital products.
highlights: Developed content frameworks and standardized voice/tone guidelines.
Increased CleverTap campaign CTR from 4% to 12% and achieved 52% conversion via journey campaigns.
Delivered branded content for clients like Amdocs, HP, GoDaddy, and Publicis Sapient.

experience.summary: Vendor point of contact for NEET, IIT-JEE, and SSC categories, managing operational execution.
highlights: Executed YouTube and Telegram campaigns and optimized SEO with SEMrush.
Supervised educators and subject matter experts for content delivery.

experience.summary: Developed brand campaigns for internal communications and employee engagement.
highlights: Created multi-channel marketing strategies to support client growth.
Produced SEO blogs and optimized content performance via analytics.

projects.title: 'Her' Movie Promotion
projects.subtitle: Influencer Campaign
projects.description: Managed digital promotions with MissMalini and Sanya Malhotra for the movie 'Her', ensuring brand alignment.

projects.title: Kancheepuram Silk Storytelling
projects.subtitle: Anya Boutiques
projects.description: Heritage storytelling campaign spotlighting artisans and driving engagement through culturally resonant narratives.

projects.title: F1Studioz Blog Series
projects.subtitle: Product Design & Thought Leadership
projects.description: Authored multiple in-depth articles on product redesign, remote work mental health, and World Design Capital Valencia. These posts drove significant engagement and established thought leadership for the agency.

projects.title: HerKey Social Campaigns
projects.subtitle: LinkedIn & Instagram Growth
projects.description: Led end-to-end content creation for HerKey's social media platforms, including HerRising 2025 event promotions, AI sessions, and career growth initiatives.
